name: Union Optech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Union Optech Co.,Ltd. engages in optical lens design and development, and precision manufacturing and sales in China. Its products are used in security video surveillance cameras, mobile phones, automotive imaging systems, video conferencing, digital cameras/camcorders, smart home, sports DV, aerial drone, VR VR, and laser projection products. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Zhongshan, China.
